note_main_file: id=90 Starlight Wrath (spec_tree=-1) — flags were [4,0,0] (Starfire only). Wrath=[1,0,0] has a different bit. CORRECTED to [5,0,0] = Wrath(1)|Starfire(4).
id=91 Moonfury (spec_tree=-1) — flags were [4,0,0] (Starfire only). Wrath=[1] and Moonfire=[2] both different. CORRECTED to [7,0,0] = Wrath(1)|Moonfire(2)|Starfire(4).
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Druid family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.
_notes.note_starfall: Starfall flags not yet verified (.spellinfo all 48505 or current ID). Nature's Majesty (id=321) currently excludes Starfall — OR in its bit once confirmed.

talent_affixes.name: Starlight Wrath
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[5,0,0]: OR of Wrath(5176) mask0 bit0(0x1=1)|Starfire(2912) mask0 bit2(0x4=4). Cast time -100ms/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Moonglow
talent_affixes.notes: All Druid spell mana cost -3%/rank. All-ones used — 'all Druid spells' is not addressable as a sub-type via family SpellMod; acceptable scope for Balance spec affixes.

talent_affixes.name: Nature's Majesty
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[37,33554432,0]: OR of Wrath(5176) mask0 bit0(0x1=1)|Starfire(2912) mask0 bit2(0x4=4)|HealingTouch(5185) mask0 bit5(0x20=32)|Nourish(50464) mask1 bit25(0x2000000=33554432). Starfall not yet included — OR in once flags confirmed. Crit +2%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 200=2%).

talent_affixes._todo: Improved Moonfire (2r, tier 2) — Two effects: DAMAGE PCT +5%/rank AND CRIT_CHANCE +5%/rank on Moonfire. See id=322 (DAMAGE PCT primary). A second entry for CRIT_CHANCE FLAT +500/rank on flags=[2,0,0] can be added if desired.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Moonfire
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2,0,0]=0x00000002 (mask0 bit1). No shared Druid marker bits. Moonfire damage +5%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Nature's Grace (3r, tier 3) — Your spell crits reduce the cast time of your next spell by 0.5/1/1.5s. Proc-based next-cast modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Nature's Splendor (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Improved Insect Swarm (3r, tier 3) — Increases Wrath damage when Insect Swarm is active on target. Target-debuff conditional, not implementable as SpellMod.
Brambles (3r, tier 3) — Increases damage of Thorns and Wild Growth. Thorns proc + Wild Growth are complex interactions, not implementable as SpellMod.
Omen of Clarity (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Balance of Power (2r, tier 4) — Reduces the effect of hit reduction on your spells. Resist/mechanic stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Celestial Focus (3r, tier 4) — Increases spell haste and reduces stun duration. Passive stat + mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Lunar Guidance (3r, tier 5) — Increases spell power by 6/12/20% of Intellect. Stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.
Earth and Moon (3r, tier 5) — Increases magic damage taken by the target by 4/7/13%. Target debuff, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Empowered Moonfire
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2,0,0]=0x00000002 (mask0 bit1). Same carrier as id=322. No shared Druid marker bits. Moonfire spell power bonus +4%/rank (modeled as DAMAGE PCT).

talent_affixes._todo: Improved Faerie Fire (3r, tier 6) — Your Faerie Fire reduces target's chance to hit by 1/2/3% and increases your hit chance with spells. Target debuff component + passive hit. Complex; deferring.
Dreamstate (3r, tier 6) — Restores 4/7/10% of base mana every 5 sec while in combat. Passive mana regen, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Moonfury
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[7,0,0]: OR of Wrath(5176) mask0 bit0(0x1=1)|Moonfire(8921) mask0 bit1(0x2=2)|Starfire(2912) mask0 bit2(0x4=4). Damage +2%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Master Shapeshifter (2r, tier 7) — Grants bonus based on current form. Aura-conditional form bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.
Insect Swarm (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Genesis
talent_affixes.notes: Druid periodic spell damage/healing +1%/rank. All-ones used — 'periodic Druid spells' cannot be targeted as a sub-type; acceptable scope for Balance spec affixes.

talent_affixes._todo: Owlkin Frenzy (3r, tier 8) — Being struck by a harmful spell while in Moonkin form gives a 15% chance to grant Owlkin Frenzy proc. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Eclipse (3r, tier 8) — When you critically hit with Starfire/Wrath, you gain a proc that boosts the other. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Moonkin Form (3r, tier 9) — Moonkin Form grants haste and passive benefit. Passive aura, not implementable as SpellMod.
Starfall (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
